title: autonovel command frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter contract for every commands/*.md file. Each command's frontmatter is parsed by adapters.base.parse_command and translated to runtime-specific shape by the per-runtime adapter (claude_code, codex, gemini). This schema catches typos and shape drift before runtime.

name.description: Slash-command identifier. Always namespaced under `autonovel:`. Lowercase + dashes/underscores only.

description.description: One-line user-facing description. Surfaced in the runtime's slash-command picker.

argument-hint.description: Argument syntax hint shown in the picker. Use angle brackets for required values, square brackets for optional, pipes for alternatives.

model_tier.description: Runtime model selection. heavy → Opus-class; standard → Sonnet-class; light → Haiku-class.

allowed-tools.description: Generic tool names the command may invoke. Adapters translate these to runtime-specific names (Read/Write/Bash/Task/etc.).

reads.description: Paths the command reads. May contain {placeholder} substitutions like {book}, {chapter}, {prev}, {topic}. Tier-2 contract tests verify each path appears in the body.

writes.description: Paths the command writes. Same placeholder rules as `reads`. An empty list (or omission) declares the command read-only by contract.

context_mode.description: How _begin should infer missing arguments. `none` = no inference; `book` = single-book inference allowed; `series` = series-wide inference.
